name: Butterfield Bank
description: Bermuda's largest locally-headquartered bank and one of the island's most respected financial institutions. Offers personal banking (current accounts, savings, mortgages), private banking, and corporate services. Expats moving to Bermuda typically open an account here or at HSBC Bermuda. Account opening requires an employer letter, work permit, proof of address, and passport — allow 2–4 weeks. Monthly account fees apply (unlike US free checking). Online and mobile banking available.
